reference: Nothing to worry about; it may be viral diarrhea and will likely resolve in the next two days. Continue feeding her oral rehydration solution and probiotic medication, and keep a watch on her urine output.
text: Nothing to worry about. It may be viral diarrhea and will likely resolve in the next two days. Continue feeding her oral rehydration solution and probiotic medication and keep a watch on her urine output.
